review_text: Sound quality is incredible. Deep bass and clear mids make music come alive.
Battery lasts 40 hours as promised. Brilliant for long trips.
Build quality is cheap plastic. Headband cracked after 2 weeks.
Noise cancellation is not effective at all. Can still hear everything around me.
Packaging was excellent. Came in a nice hard case with all accessories.
Sound leaks badly at high volume. Everyone around me can hear my music.
Comfortable fit even after 4 hours of continuous use. Ear cushions are soft.
Delivery was super quick. Ordered on Monday, got it Tuesday.
Customer service was useless. Sent me a replacement with the same defect.
Bekar sound quality. Bas bilkul nahi hai. Paisa waste.
Price is justified for what you get. Premium feel and great audio.
The Bluetooth keeps disconnecting. Very annoying during calls.

Audio quality dropped after a software update. Was better before.
Not worth the price. You can get better options for half the cost.
Build is surprisingly sturdy. Dropped it twice and not a scratch.
Packaging was terrible. Just a thin cardboard box with no padding.
Battery drains fast when using noise cancellation. Only 8 hours.
